datapoints.description: 1 if this member has a leader, 0 if not
datapoints.name: has_leader

datapoints.description: 1 if this member is the current leader
datapoints.name: is_leader

description: Discovers etcd cluster members and monitors leader status via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers etcd members from etcd_server_has_leader metric. Collection reports leader status per member.
name: Etcd_Member_Discovery
